text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa, Ryan. You're still working out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, yeah. My body fat percentage crept up, so
I've gotta squeeze in as much exercise as I can.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry. Is it okay with you that I'm working out
in our room?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sure, I don't mind at all!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But I bet you only need to do a tiny bit anyway.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're always working out, so you're
already super fit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And yet, despite all my training, I still gained
weight. It's proof that I'm still not peeled.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta keep myself in tip-top shape so I can
run my best!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Haha. You're always so cool, Ryan. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Come on, stop teasing me, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result of her strict training, Mejiro Ryan
successfully gets back into shape.
